name: Amplitude
description: Amplitude is a digital analytics platform for understanding user behavior. Track events, analyze user journeys, build cohorts, and run experiments to drive product growth.

capabilities.name: track_events
capabilities.description: Send event data to Amplitude for user behavior tracking.

capabilities.name: query_events
capabilities.description: Query event segmentation data with filters and grouping.

capabilities.name: get_user_activity
capabilities.description: Get the event stream for a specific user.

capabilities.name: get_funnel
capabilities.description: Analyze a conversion funnel between specified events.

capabilities.name: get_retention
capabilities.description: Get retention analysis data for user cohorts.

capabilities.name: export_events
capabilities.description: Export raw event data for a date range.
